complaint: Water is pouring from my bathroom ceiling. It's getting worse by the minute.
The kitchen faucet has a slow drip. Not urgent but it's annoying.
No heat in my apartment. It's 20 degrees outside and my kids are freezing.
The AC makes a clicking sound sometimes. Still works fine though.
I see sparks coming from an outlet when I plug things in. Scared it might catch fire.
One light switch in the hallway doesn't work. We just use the other switch.
Found mouse droppings in the kitchen pantry. Saw a mouse run across the floor last night.
The oven won't heat up at all. Can't cook any meals for my family.
The bathroom door handle fell off. Door won't close properly now.
Strong gas smell in the kitchen. I've opened windows and left the apartment.
Toilet is overflowing and won't stop. Water is spreading to the hallway.
The paint on the bedroom ceiling is peeling. Small flakes keep falling.
AC is blowing hot air. Temperature inside is over 95 degrees. I have elderly parents staying with me.
I found what looks like black mold growing behind the bathroom tiles. My daughter has been coughing a lot.
The washing machine is leaking a small amount of water during the rinse cycle.
Multiple ants coming in through the window in the kitchen. Getting worse each day.
The front door deadbolt is jammed. I can't lock my door when I leave for work.
Flickering lights in multiple rooms. Happened suddenly tonight.
The refrigerator is making a loud buzzing noise but still seems to be working.
Water heater is not producing any hot water. We've had cold showers for two days.
